description:
Recto: Legal document dated 1350 Seleucid = 1038/39 CE. Qaraite, based on the use of למנין יונים. In which Sibāʿ b. Menashshe renounces all claims to anything belonging to Binyamin b. Yosef and his wife Ghaniyya bt. ʿAmram since he divorced their daughter Riḍā. 

Verso, in later hand, contains two liturgical compositions published by Israel Davidson.

Information mainly from Halper catalogue. The join is listed on Ktiv without attribution.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בCAJS.
